utterances.speaker: The Vendor
utterances.text: So , what are you guys in the market for ? We have got uh , scarves , tulip post cards ...

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Check this out ? Huh ? Yeah . That is the stuff . What do you think ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
